title: Gendo traveling across anime universes
wikitext:
[]: Gendo traveling across anime universes...             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Fri Feb 18, 2011 7:12 pm Ok so recently ive been watching Blue Gender, i know yea w.e, but while watching i couldnt help but notice that one character caught my eye and... the reason is the first time i saw them the first time i couldnt gelp but DIE of laughter cause of how similar to gendo they looked.... i cant find the right picture for it just cause its not there and im too lazy.... but if uve watched it b4 u know who im talking about.... silly gendo traveling across universes hes so silly

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Fri Feb 18, 2011 7:16 pm ... and next I am here. talk about deja vu but yeah please post a picture

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Feb 18, 2011 7:32 pm Oh, and here I thought this was going to be about Campus Apocalypse. Bah.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Feb 18, 2011 10:42 pm As I recall, the Blue Gender Gendo suffered a bad end as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Nick » Sat Feb 19, 2011 1:43 am http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4tvw0KhskME#t=3m39s

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 19, 2011 3:25 am ^ A beardy man with glasses and a floating octahedron that shoots lasers from its midsection? Why is this not in our Wiki? :O

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Sat Feb 19, 2011 9:43 am Dr. Nick wrote: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4tvw0KhskME#t=3m39s

[]:             Quote Post by BeamKatana » Sun Feb 20, 2011 11:14 am Not anime, and of course the only picture of him I can find is this little crappy one, but in the amazingly boring movie "The Dead Talk Back," Gendo played one of the main characters. The movie was featured on MST3K in season 6.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Mon Feb 21, 2011 12:42 pm Wow. And it's the girl in the red machine that gets her mind. um. probed. The similarity is pretty striking. Now if only Asuka could've done that to Arael... :/

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Mon Feb 21, 2011 2:06 pm Reichu wrote: ^ A beardy man with glasses and a floating octahedron that shoots lasers from its midsection? Why is this not in our Wiki? :O

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Mon Feb 21, 2011 8:36 pm I wouldn't restrict it to anime universes.....

[]:             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Tue Feb 22, 2011 10:03 am Ok so i found a picture of who i meant... its a little off but still it screamed gendo at me =D... also srry bout the quality i forgot i needed a picture and just took one with my phone while watching when this came up

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Feb 22, 2011 1:10 pm The resemblance is certainly there...

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Tue Feb 22, 2011 3:08 pm Wait, wasn't Blue Gender the anime that ADV dubbed before Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Feb 22, 2011 4:20 pm Cody MacArthur Fett wrote: Wait, wasn't Blue Gender the anime that ADV dubbed before Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Tue Feb 22, 2011 5:36 pm BrikHaus wrote: No, it was done by Funimation, and it came after Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Tue Feb 22, 2011 7:17 pm Cody MacArthur Fett wrote: Ah . . . Then what the hell am I thinking about? I know the title had Blue something in the name.

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Tue Feb 22, 2011 7:43 pm Fireand'chutes77 wrote: Nadia of Blue Water...? Blue Submarine No. 6....? That's all I got.

[]:             Quote Post by JUSTINBAILEY » Thu Feb 24, 2011 2:49 pm Animejunkie wrote: Ok so i found a picture of who i meant... its a little off but still it screamed gendo at me =D... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Nick » Thu Feb 24, 2011 5:28 pm Reichu wrote: ^ A beardy man with glasses and a floating octahedron that shoots lasers from its midsection? Why is this not in our Wiki? :O

Article: Gendo traveling across anime universes
 anime, and of course the only picture of him I can find is this little crappy one, but in the amazingly boring movie "The Dead Talk Back," Gendo played one of the main characters. The movie was featured on MST3K in season 6.
